title: Recovery from abandoned signup
scenario_context: User starts signup, abandons mid-flow. Email reminder with resume link.
reasoning: Save partial state on email entry. Send 1d, 3d, 7d emails with magic-link to resume.

error_handling_strategy.client_error_mapping: Map each code to a visible retry, denied, empty, or validation state.

observability_hooks: Emit e2e-241_total with scenario id, tenant hash, actor role, result code, denial reason, retry count, provider fixture id when applicable, and assertion outcome.
what_distinguishes_senior_thinking: 1) Partial save. 2) Bounded reminders. 3) Opt-in.

title: 2FA enforcement per tenant
scenario_context: Enterprise tenant requires 2FA for all members. New users prompted to enroll.
reasoning: Tenant setting. Force enroll on next login if missing. Backup codes. Recovery via admin.

title: Adding markdown rendering: sanitize + plugins + storage
scenario_context: Comments support markdown. Need: parse, sanitize, render, store raw.
reasoning: Store raw. On render, parse to AST, sanitize. react-markdown with rehype-sanitize.

error_handling_strategy.user_facing_messages: Unsafe markdown was removed
error_handling_strategy.recovery_actions: Edit markdown and preview again

test_strategy: Use fixtures for javascript links, data URLs, SVG/script, event handlers, raw HTML, nested images, and plugin output; assert DOM is sanitized and links follow safe policy.
observability_hooks: Track sanitizer rule hits, blocked link protocols, and render failures by content type.
what_distinguishes_senior_thinking: 1) Store raw, render safe. 2) AST sanitize. 3) Whitelist.

title: Cascading failure: timeout config per dependency
scenario_context: DB slow → app slow → load balancer marks unhealthy → restart → repeat. Need bounded timeouts.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Single slow query hangs request thread.
reasoning: Per-dependency timeouts: DB 3s, Stripe 5s, internal 1s. Total request timeout enforced.

// Frontend contract for e2e-250: render the user-visible state, drive it through real interactions, and assert accessible output.
